column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Throwing colorful confetti into the air" | TEXT="おめでとうございます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Opening a large celebratory scroll" | TEXT="おめでたいですね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Lifting a sake cup for a toast warmly" | TEXT="祝杯を上げましょう" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Tai-fish (celebratory fish) on a grand platter" | TEXT="めでたい尽くしですわ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Playing a traditional flute in celebration" | TEXT="音に祝いを込めて" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling like a sunbeam surrounded by flowers" | TEXT="記念すべき日ですわ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Handing over a red-and-white envelope" | TEXT="お祝いの品です" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Applauding gracefully with both hands" | TEXT="感服の極みです" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at the stars in celebration" | TEXT="世に幸あれ"
